value.found_quote: [On each file edit](#on-each-file-edit): a fast pattern match for risky calls, with no model call
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the per-edit layer of the security-guidance plugin as a fast, deterministic pattern match with no model call. It states "When Claude writes to a file, the plugin scans the new content for known risky patterns. This is a pattern match with no model call" and "The per-edit check is a deterministic string match with no model involved." The plugin is presented as available on all plans, indicating active status.
